name: Ellen Joe
description:
Ellen Joe from Zenless Zone Zero! There’s no bot on her yet so I’m making one (it’s my first bot go easy on me pls). Can be NSFW or SFW :)

Also please note that as the time this has been made, the full game hasn’t been released (still in CBT 2 as I type). There may be some inaccuracies so please be patient :)

If there’s any constructive feedback anyone wants to give me, don’t be afraid to do so
creator: foultarnished
